baseBehaviors: W_ThrowWeapon (Base qcsrc/server/weapons/throwing.qc:129-152): gates in order — held weapon != WEP_Null; time >= game_starttime; MUTATOR ForbidThrowCurrentWeapon; autocvar_g_weapon_throwable (xonotic-server.cfg:206 default 1); slot state == WS_READY; W_IsWeaponThrowable. Then: remove the weapon bit from STAT(WEAPONS) (line 144) BEFORE anything else, W_SwitchWeapon_Force to w_getbestweapon (146), W_ThrowNewWeapon(owner, wpn, doreduce, this.origin+delta, velo) (147); a<0 (startitem_failed) = silent loss; else Send_Notification ITEM_WEAPON_DROP(wepid, ammo-amount) (151).

W_ThrowNewWeapon (throwing.qc:22-114): spawn loot entity — ITEM_SET_LOOT, origin=org, velocity=velo, owner=enemy=thrower, FL_TOSSED, colormap; W_DropEvent wr_drop (37); SUPERWEAPON split (39-71): if the weapon is in WEPSET_SUPERWEAPONS set ITEM_SET_EXPIRING; with IT_UNLIMITED_SUPERWEAPONS item gets superweapons_finished = time + g_balance_superweapons_time (balance-xonotic.cfg:241 = 30); else count held superweapons: if this is the LAST one the item inherits the player's whole Superweapon status-effect time and the effect is REMOVED from the player; if more remain, item gets timeleft/count and the player's effect time is reduced by that share. Then weapon_defaultspawnfunc (73; seeds default pickup ammo) and pickup_anyway=true (77). AMMO TAIL (80-113): ammo-less weapon returns 0; if doreduce && g_weapon_stay==2 (xonotic-server.cfg:205 default 0): give the player back any weapon_load[i] (clip) and schedule reload (weapon_load=-1), then SetResource(wep, ammotype, 0) — thrown gun is EMPTY; if doreduce (normal): clip give-back same way, then thisammo = min(owner ammo, wep's seeded pickup ammo), item keeps thisammo, owner loses thisammo, return thisammo; else (death drop, doreduce=false) keep the seeded default and return 0.

W_IsWeaponThrowable (throwing.qc:116-126): false if MUTATOR ForbidDropCurrentWeapon(this, w) (note: takes the WEAPON id — the port's existing hook only carries the player); false if g_pickup_items == 0 (xonotic-server.cfg:218 default -1) or g_weaponarena; false for WEP_Null; else the per-weapon balance cvar g_balance_<wep>_weaponthrowable (bal-wep-xonotic.cfg: 1 for all except blaster:43=0, fireball:671=0, okhmg:808=0, okrpc:895=0).

IMPULSE(weapon_drop)=17 (qcsrc/common/impulses/all.qh:106,124 — legacy alias 247; qcsrc/server/impulse.qc:334-351): gates vehicle + IS_DEAD; per slot: dv = v_right*-movedir.y only when dual-wielding else '0 0 0'; velocity = W_CalculateProjectileVelocity(this, this.velocity, v_forward*750, false) (tracing.qc:174-183) — with stock g_projectiles_newton_style 0 (balance-xonotic.cfg:205) this is ABSOLUTE: just v_forward*750 (× W_WeaponSpeedFactor, default 1), no player-velocity inheritance; doreduce=true.

Death drop (qcsrc/server/player.qc:528-537): runs in the kill path AFTER the PlayerDies mutator hook (498), the resuscitation bail (522), and calculate_player_respawn_time (526), BEFORE corpse setup: per slot SpawnThrownWeapon(this, origin+(mins+maxs)*0.5, held weapon). SpawnThrownWeapon (throwing.qc:154-161): only if owned && W_IsWeaponThrowable; W_ThrowNewWeapon(doreduce=false, velocity = randomvec()*125 + '0 0 200').

Pinata (qcsrc/common/mutators/mutator/pinata/sv_pinata.qc:1-30): REGISTER_MUTATOR(pinata, expr_evaluate(g_pinata) && !instagib && !overkill); g_pinata default 0, g_pinata_offhand default 0 (mutators.cfg:557-558). On PlayerDies: for each owned weapon EXCEPT the held one (the held one drops via the normal death path), if throwable, W_ThrowNewWeapon(doreduce=false, CENTER_OR_VIEWOFS, randomvec()*175 + '0 0 325').

accuracy_add (qcsrc/server/weapons/accuracy.qc:102-129): per-weapon FLOAT tallies — fired += max potential damage, hit += damage dealt (may exceed fired, networked as 255), real += post-excess damage; cnt_hit/cnt_fired increment at most once per server frame (fired_time / STAT(HIT_TIME) == time guards, lines 115-123); skips independent players, WEP_Null, all-zero adds; SendFlags |= BIT(wepid%24) only when accuracy_byte changed, propagated to spectators (128). accuracy_byte (17-24): 0 = never fired; n>d → 255; else 1 + rint(n*100/d) — the ratio is hit DAMAGE / fired DAMAGE, not shot counts.

accuracy_isgooddamage (accuracy.qc:133-150): false during warmup_stage or game_stopped; false for a dead target EXCEPT in the frame it died (death_time == time) so multi-pellet kills count fully; false for SAME_TEAM(attacker,targ) (in FFA SAME_TEAM is identity → self never counts); AccuracyTargetValid mutator can force-allow (MUT_ACCADD_INVALID→true) or veto; else requires IS_CLIENT(targ) && IS_CLIENT(attacker). accuracy_canbegooddamage (154-157) = !warmup_stage && IS_CLIENT(attacker). IMPORTANT: every QC hit-credit call site evaluates isgooddamage BEFORE calling Damage() (tracing.qc:323,446; damage.qc:913), so the 'death frame' rule falls out naturally.

FIRED call site (qcsrc/server/weapons/tracing.qc:64-66, inside W_SetupShot_Dir_ProjectileSize_Range): if IS_PLAYER(ent) && accuracy_canbegooddamage(ent) → accuracy_add(ent, DEATH_WEAPONOF(deathtype), maxdamage, 0, 0). maxdamage is the PER-CALL potential damage each weapon passes to W_SetupShot (e.g. vortex.qc:137 passes mydmg AFTER the charge multiplier; shotgun passes damage*bullets; vaporizer.qc:110-111 adds an extra fired for WEP_DEVASTATOR with g_rm_damage in rocket-minsta).

HIT call sites: (a) FireRailgunBullet (tracing.qc:323-348): totaldmg += bdamage*falloff per pierced target passing isgooddamage (checked BEFORE Damage at 329); after the loop ONE accuracy_add(this, this.(weaponentity).m_weapon, 0, min(bdamage, totaldmg), 0) — capped at one shot's damage; (b) fireBullet_falloff (tracing.qc:446-477): gooddamage captured before Damage (446); credit per hit = min(damage - total_damage, damage*damage_fraction) — penetration fraction applied but distance falloff NOT applied to the credit (474), running total caps at 100%; (c) RadiusDamageForSource (qcsrc/server/damage.qc:909-929): stat_damagedone += finaldmg for each iscreature target passing isgooddamage (913-914), then if !DEATH_ISSPECIAL one accuracy_add(attacker, DEATH_WEAPONOF(dt), 0, min(max(coredamage,edgedamage), stat_damagedone), 0) (928-929); (d) Fire_AddDamage DoT (damage.qc:1052-1053, 1066-1067); (e) per-weapon extras: shotgun melee (shotgun.qc:158-159), arc beam (arc.qc:449-450), fireball BFG rays (fireball.qc:55-56), okrpc (okrpc.qc:73-81).

REAL call site (qcsrc/server/player.qc:423-447, inside PlayerDamage): dh/da = actual health/armor removed; gated on (dh||da) && !PlayerDamaged-hook-veto; realdmg = damage - excess; if (targ != attacker || DEATH_KILL) && realdmg && round started && time>=game_starttime, and IS_PLAYER(attacker) && DIFF_TEAM && deathtype != DEATH_KILL: accuracy_isgooddamage → accuracy_add(attacker, awep, 0, 0, realdmg); attacker.score_frame_dmg += realdmg. awep (416-419) = DEATH_WEAPONOF(deathtype), or the attacker's HELD weapon for special deathtypes. Frag count: player.qc:493-495 — on kill, if DEATH_WEAPONOF != WEP_Null && isgooddamage, ++accuracy_frags[wepid].

accuracy networking (accuracy.qc:26-56 accuracy_send / ENT_CLIENT_ACCURACY): one linked entity per client, drawonlytoclient (only the owner receives it) EXCEPT spectators of that player; non-owner recipients get sendflags forced to 0 unless sv_accuracy_data_share (xonotic-server.cfg:512 default 1) AND the owner's cl_accuracy_data_share (xonotic-client.cfg:920 default 0) — so by default accuracy is PRIVATE to the owner; payload = WriteInt24 sendflags then one accuracy_byte per flagged weapon; accuracy_resend sets sendflags 0xFFFFFF.

Vortex charge (qcsrc/common/weapons/weapon/vortex.qc): stock cvars (bal-wep-xonotic.cfg:333-380) charge=1, charge_start=0.5, charge_mindmg=40, charge_rate=0.6, charge_limit=1, charge_animlimit=0.5, charge_shot_multiplier=0, charge_velocity_rate=0 (minspeed 400, maxspeed 800), charge_rot_rate=0, charge_always=0, secondary=0, secondary_ammo=2, secondary_chargepool=0, chargepool_regen=0.15, chargepool_pause_regen=1, reload_ammo=0, primary_ammo=6, primary_damage=80. wr_think (185-276) runs TWICE per server frame (weaponsystem.qc:595, W_TICSPERFRAME=2 weaponsystem.qh:13) so every dt = frametime/2: (1) if !charge_always, W_Vortex_Charge regen toward limit (174-178: only while charge<charge_limit, charge=min(1, charge+rate*dt)); (2) chargepool regen (190-196): if sec chargepool && pool<1 — pool regens by chargepool_regen*dt ONLY after actor.vortex_chargepool_pauseregen_finished < time, and actor.pauseregen_finished (the PLAYER HEALTH-REGEN pause) is pushed to time+chargepool_pause_regen the whole while; (3) forced reload (198-202): if g_balance_vortex_reload_ammo && clip_load < min(pri_ammo, sec_ammo) → wr_reload and RETURN; (4) primary fire; (5) the charge key (212): (charge && !secondary) ? ZOOM button : (fire&2). Charging branch (214-265): vortex_charge_rottime = time + charge_rot_pause; while charge<1: chargepool path (221-233) — pool depletes by sec_ammo*dt ALWAYS while held, dt clamped to min(dt, (1-charge)/charge_rate) then bound(0, dt, pool), pauseregen_finished = time+chargepool_pause_regen, charge += dt*charge_rate; sec-ammo path (235-259) — only when fire&2 actually pressed, dt = min(dt,(1-charge)/rate) then clamped so the RESERVE never drops below pri_ammo: dt = bound(0, dt, (GetResource - pri_ammo)/sec_ammo) (or the clip_load variant when reload_ammo), resource -= sec_ammo*dt, charge += dt*rate; free path (260-264) — dt=min(dt,(1-charge)/rate), charge += dt*rate. Secondary REAL fire mode (267-274) only when g_balance_vortex_secondary. W_Vortex_Attack (113-170): charge = mindmg/dmg + (1-mindmg/dmg)*vortex_charge; vortex_charge *= charge_shot_multiplier AFTER; dmg/force *= charge; overcharge sound when charge>animlimit at volume (charge-0.5*animlimit)/(1-0.5*animlimit). wr_resetplayer (299-311): charge=charge_start, pool=1. wr_checkammo2 (287-298): false when secondary==0 (zoom is not a fire mode). Velocity-charge mutator (87-111, GetPressedKeys hook): while HOLDING the vortex and xyspeed>minspeed, charge += velocity_rate * f * frametime where f=(min(xyspeed,maxspeed)-minspeed)/(maxspeed-minspeed). Unequipped rot decay (qcsrc/server/client.qc:2461-2486): charge_always path calls W_Vortex_Charge every PlayerFrame; rot drains charge toward chargelimit at charge_rot_rate after vortex_charge_rottime — ALL stock-disabled (rates 0).
chokepointSnippets: ServerNet.cs (T54 owner) — accuracy wire, server leg. In the per-client snapshot composer (game/net/ServerNet.cs:803-811, the `sendScores` block), append a SECOND change-gated block immediately AFTER the scoreboard block and BEFORE `st.SnapHistory.EncodeSnapshot(...)` (line 814), mirroring the sendScores pattern: `int accGen = _world.Scores.AccuracyGeneration(p); bool sendAcc = st.LastAccuracyGen != accGen; _snapshotWriter.WriteBool(sendAcc); if (sendAcc) { byte[] acc = _world.Scores.AccuracyBytes(p); _snapshotWriter.WriteByte(acc.Length); for (int i = 0; i < acc.Length; i++) _snapshotWriter.WriteByte(acc[i]); st.LastAccuracyGen = accGen; }` — acc[i] = QC accuracy_byte for weapon RegistryId i (0 = never fired, 1..101 = pct+1, 255 = >100%). Needs one new PeerState field `int LastAccuracyGen = -1`. Scores.AccuracyBytes(Player)/AccuracyGeneration(Player) are provided by T57 (Scores.cs owner). This is the QC ENT_CLIENT_ACCURACY drawonlytoclient equivalent: each client receives only its OWN accuracy (sv_accuracy_data_share spectator sharing deferred — stock cl_accuracy_data_share defaults 0 anyway).

ClientNet.cs (T54 owner) — accuracy wire, client leg. In HandleSnapshot, at the exact wire position matching the server leg (after the scoreboard-block read that corresponds to ServerNet.cs:803-811; the owner fixed block ends at `SpectateeStatus = r.ReadShort()` game/net/ClientNet.cs:478): `bool hasAcc = r.ReadBool(); if (hasAcc) { int n = r.ReadByte(); var acc = new Dictionary<int,int>(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) acc[i] = r.ReadByte(); LocalAccuracy = acc; LocalAccuracyGeneration++; }` — expose `public IReadOnlyDictionary<int,int>? LocalAccuracy { get; private set; }` (weapon RegistryId → accuracy byte) + `public int LocalAccuracyGeneration { get; private set; }` so NetGame can cheaply poll-and-feed ScoreboardPanel.SetAccuracy (pct = byte-1, byte 255 → 100, byte 0 → -1/skip; game/hud/ScoreboardPanel.cs:218-223) and WeaponsPanel.SetAccuracy (NetName → fraction; game/hud/WeaponsPanel.cs:45-51). Field order MUST stay in lockstep with the ServerNet write (append-at-END rule).
NetProtocol.cs (T54 owner): bump game/net/NetProtocol.cs:50 `public const uint ProtocolVersion = 6;` → 7 (the snapshot stream gains the accuracy block).

GameWorld.cs (chokepoint owner) — NO EDIT REQUIRED: GameWorld.cs:403 already calls Scores.SubscribeToDeaths(...); T57 wires the new Common accuracy/throw event subscriptions INSIDE Scores.SubscribeToDeaths (Scores.cs:764, owned by T57), so the accuracy bus comes alive through the existing call. (If the orchestrator prefers an explicit call, the one-liner is `Scores.SubscribeToAccuracy();` right after line 403.)

Commands.cs (chokepoint owner) — NO EDIT REQUIRED: Commands.cs:998 already routes every impulse to WeaponImpulses.Handle; T57 implements impulse 17 inside WeaponImpulses.cs (owned), replacing the recognized no-op at WeaponImpulses.cs:113-116.

MapObjectsRegistry.cs / Registries.cs (chokepoint owners) — NO EDIT REQUIRED: the new PinataMutator is a NEW file picked up by the [Mutator] reflection auto-registration (per the established A-wave convention); ItemSpawnFuncs.Register is already invoked from MapObjectsRegistry.cs:23.

DamageSystem.cs — T57 IS the owner this wave; the real-credit hook (PlayerDamage, after the PlayerDamaged hook block at DamageSystem.cs:441-449) and the death weapon-drop call (Killed, between the resuscitation bail at DamageSystem.cs:504-505/respawn-time at 518-519 and the corpse setup at 521) are direct edits, not snippets.

plan: 1. Create WeaponAccuracyEvents.cs (Common, Weapons/): the accuracy_add bus (`Action<Entity,Weapon,float,float,float>` style Add + Fired/Hit/Real helpers), IsGoodDamage / CanBeGoodDamage ports (gates per accuracy.qc:133-157: NotificationSystem.WarmupStage || GameScores.GameStopped → false; targ.DeadState != No → false [all credit sites evaluate PRE-damage, matching QC's order]; Teams.SameTeam (FFA = identity, so self excluded) → false; both must have EntFlags.Client), and accuracy_byte. No-op when nothing is subscribed (headless tests unaffected).

2. Fired credit at the port's W_SetupShot chokepoint: add optional `Weapon? wep = null, float maxDamage = 0f` to BOTH WeaponFiring.SetupShot overloads (WeaponFiring.cs:105,156); after computing the shot, if (actor.Flags & Client) != 0 && CanBeGoodDamage(actor) && wep != null && maxDamage > 0 → WeaponAccuracyEvents.Fired(actor, wep, maxDamage) (tracing.qc:64-66). Update every weapon's SetupShot call (~36 sites listed in recon, e.g. Vortex.cs:131 passes the post-charge mydmg per vortex.qc:137, Shotgun.cs:161 passes damage*bullets, Machinegun.cs:192/221/265 the per-mode damage) — each value read from that weapon's QC W_SetupShot call. Optionally add the Vaporizer rocket-minsta extra fired (vaporizer.qc:110-111).

3. Hit credit, hitscan (WeaponFiring.cs, owned): FireBullet — capture `bool good = IsGoodDamage(actor, hit)` BEFORE ApplyDamage (mirror tracing.qc:446), then per good hit add min(damage - totalDamage, damage*damageFraction) (NO distance falloff in the credit — tracing.qc:474) and accumulate totalDamage += damage*damageFraction; weapon = Inventory.CurrentWeapon(actor). FireRailgunBullet — accumulate totaldmg += damage*falloff per pierced good target (tracing.qc:323-324, before the damage loop applies), after the loop ONE Hit(actor, weapon, min(damage, totaldmg)) (tracing.qc:347-348).

4. Hit credit, splash (WeaponSplash.cs:45-104, owned): accumulate statDamageDone += finalDmg for each target passing IsGoodDamage(attacker, e) (evaluated before ApplyDamage, damage.qc:913-914); after the loop, if the deathtype names a weapon, Hit(attacker, weaponById(deathType), min(max(damage, edgeDamage), statDamageDone)) (damage.qc:928-929). Resolve the Weapon from the int deathType (weapons pass RegistryId).

5. Real credit (DamageSystem.cs PlayerDamage, owned): after the PlayerDamaged hook block (DamageSystem.cs:441-449) replicate player.qc:423-447 — realdmg = damage - excess (excess already computed at line 396); awep = weapon from DeathTypes.WeaponNetNameOf(deathType), falling back to the attacker's CurrentWeapon for special deathtypes (player.qc:416-419); if attacker is a player, targ != attacker, DIFF_TEAM, deathType != kill, realdmg > 0 and IsGoodDamage → WeaponAccuracyEvents.Real(attacker, awep, realdmg). (score_frame_dmg/AddDamageDealt wiring is a natural rider here — Scores.AddDamageDealt at Scores.cs:634 currently has no caller — but keep it a flagged optional to stay in scope.)

6. Scores.cs (owned): rework WeaponAccuracy (Scores.cs:145-185) to the QC columns — float FiredDamage, float HitDamage, float RealDamage, int CntFired, int CntHit (once-per-sim-frame guards via last-add timestamps, accuracy.qc:115-123), int Frags — keyed by weapon NetName as today; Fraction = HitDamage/FiredDamage. Subscribe WeaponAccuracyEvents inside SubscribeToDeaths (Scores.cs:764, idempotent like _deathHandler). Move the kill-credit: RecordWeaponKill (Scores.cs:622-628) stops calling AddHit (the damage path now feeds hits — leaving it would double-count) and instead increments Frags (player.qc:493-495, gated on IsGoodDamage). Export for the wire: AccuracyBytes(Player) → byte[Registry<Weapon>.Count] of accuracy_byte(HitDamage, FiredDamage) per RegistryId, and AccuracyGeneration(Player) — bump a per-row counter whenever an Add changes any weapon's byte (accuracy.qc:125).

7. Create WeaponThrowing.cs (Common, Weapons/): IsWeaponThrowable (throwing.qc:116-126; ForbidThrowCurrentWeapon chain — note the port hook lacks the weapon arg, extend ForbidThrowCurrentWeaponArgs with an optional weapon id, additive so existing handlers at MutatorHooks.cs:337-345 keep working; g_pickup_items==0 / g_weaponarena via the StartItem.PickupItemsCvar convention; Bal($"g_balance_{NetName}_weaponthrowable") with stock fallbacks 1 except blaster/fireball/okhmg/okrpc 0). ThrowNewWeapon (throwing.qc:22-114): new Entity at org with velocity/Owner/RealOwner; ItemIsExpiring + the superweapon split BEFORE SpawnLoot (count owner's IsSuperWeapon weapons in OwnedWeaponSet; last one → item.SuperweaponsFinished = effect ExpireTime − now and StatusEffectsCatalog.Remove; else the per-weapon share, reducing the player's effect ExpireTime; IT_UNLIMITED_SUPERWEAPONS → g_balance_superweapons_time (30)); StartItem.SpawnLoot(item, ItemSpawnFuncs.PickupFor(weapon)) (StartItem.cs:58 — handles MOVETYPE_TOSS, despawn at g_items_dropped_lifetime 20, anti-instant-pick, NODROP kill); null → return -1; PickupAnyway = 1; then the ammo tail — clip give-back from WeaponSlotState.WeaponLoad[id] (GiveResource to owner, set WeaponLoad[id] = -1 / ClipLoad = -1 via Weapon.SetWeaponLoad), then g_weapon_stay==2 → SetResourceExplicit(item, ammo, 0), doreduce → thisammo = min(owner ammo, item's ItemInit-seeded pickup ammo), clamp item + deduct owner, return thisammo. ThrowWeapon (129-152): gates (held weapon, time >= game-start via StartItem.GameStartTimeProvider, ForbidThrowCurrentWeapon, g_weapon_throwable (default 1), slot State == WeaponFireState.Ready, IsWeaponThrowable, owned); READ the clip BEFORE switching; dual-rep removal — Inventory.RemoveWeapon (Inventory.cs:61-65, auto-switches to best) AND (actor as Player)?.OwnedWeapons.Remove(NetName); ThrowNewWeapon(doreduce=true, origin+delta, velo); on a>=0 NotificationSystem ITEM_WEAPON_DROP (registered, NotificationsList.cs:385/896) with weapon name + ammo. SpawnThrownWeapon (154-161): owned + throwable gate, velocity Prandom.Vec()*125 + (0,0,200), doreduce=false.

8. WeaponImpulses.cs (owned): implement case Drop (lines 113-116) — vehicle gate is N/A (no vehicle field on the path; keep dead gate), compute forward via QMath.AngleVectors(actor.Angles), velocity = forward*750 (stock g_projectiles_newton_style 0 = absolute, no player-velocity term; scale by g_weaponspeedfactor if set), delta = Vector3.Zero (no dual-wield in the port), WeaponThrowing.ThrowWeapon(actor, slot0, velo, delta, doreduce: true).

9. DamageSystem.cs Killed (owned): after the resuscitation bail (DamageSystem.cs:504-505) and the respawn-time default (518-519), before the corpse block (521): WeaponThrowing.SpawnThrownWeapon(victim, victim.Origin + (victim.Mins + victim.Maxs) * 0.5f, Inventory.CurrentWeapon(victim), slot0) — the player.qc:528-537 drop. Pinata then rides the already-fired MutatorHooks.PlayerDies (DamageSystem.cs:498-499) from its own new file.

10. Create PinataMutator.cs: [Mutator] auto-registered; IsEnabled = g_pinata != 0 && !instagib && !overkill (sv_pinata.qc:5); Hook() subscribes MutatorHooks.PlayerDies; handler throws every OwnedWeaponSet weapon except the victim's current one when IsWeaponThrowable, velocity Prandom.Vec()*175 + (0,0,325) at body center (sv_pinata.qc:21-26).

11. Vortex.cs depth (owned): add the chargepool regen block (vortex.qc:190-196 — uses the existing WeaponSlotState.VortexChargePoolAmmo (EntityWeaponState.cs:278) + a new Entity.VortexChargepoolPauseRegenFinished + pushes Entity.PauseRegenFinished while pool<1); the forced reload (198-202: when g_balance_vortex_reload_ammo && ClipLoad < min(pri_ammo, sec_ammo) → WrReload and return); rework the Secondary branch to the full ladder (214-265): rot-pause stamp, chargepool-deplete path (sec_ammo*dt always while held, dt clamps, pool clamp, charge += dt*rate), sec-ammo-eating path (only fire&2 held; reserve floor = pri_ammo via dt = bound(0, dt, (resource − pri_ammo)/sec_ammo), reload_ammo variant drains ClipLoad), free path; secondary REAL fire mode when Cvars.Secondary (267-274, reusing Attack(isSecondary: true) with the SEC damage/force/falloff cvars — add them to Balance); charge_always gate on the upkeep regen (187-188); velocity-charge (vortex.qc:89-111) inside the WrThink upkeep (the vortex must be held in both QC and the port's driver, so per-tick equivalence holds): when charge_velocity_rate && xyspeed > minspeed, charge += rate * f * dt. dt stays Api.Clock.FrameTime (the driver runs WrThink once per tick vs QC twice with frametime/2 — same per-second rate). Defer the UNEQUIPPED charge-rot decay (client.qc:2478-2486) with a code comment — stock rot rates are 0 (no-op).

12. Wire + HUD: hand the ServerNet/ClientNet/NetProtocol snippets (above) to T54; add the NetGame poll — on LocalAccuracyGeneration change, build {RegistryId → pct} for ScoreboardPanel.SetAccuracy (byte 0 → skip/-1, 255 → 100, else byte−1) and {NetName → fraction} for WeaponsPanel.SetAccuracy.

13. Tests + verify: unit tests per testPlan; run `dotnet test tests/XonoticGodot.Tests` (Windows dotnet per build memory); headless `--host` auto-fire smoke to confirm fired/hit tallies move and impulse 17 drops a pickupable weapon.
portState: WeaponAccuracy is NOT a separate file — it is a class inside src/XonoticGodot.Server/Scores.cs:145-185 (Dictionary<string,int> hits/fired + Dictionary<string,float> damage, keyed by weapon NetName); its Fraction (177-181) is a COUNT ratio (hits/fired), not QC's damage ratio. Scores.RecordShotFired/RecordHit (Scores.cs:325-334) exist but have ZERO callers (confirmed by grep; TODO.md:1182 documents this). The only live accuracy write is Scores.RecordWeaponKill (Scores.cs:622-628), called from Obituary (413) — one AddHit per KILL. So fired is always 0 and the scoreboard accuracy reads empty.

WeaponImpulses.Handle Drop case (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/Weapons/WeaponImpulses.cs:113-116) is a recognized NO-OP ('the throw itself is left to the throwing port'). Commands.DispatchImpulse routes to it at src/XonoticGodot.Server/Commands.cs:998. There is NO throwing.qc port anywhere (no W_ThrowWeapon/W_ThrowNewWeapon/SpawnThrownWeapon hits in the tree); death in DamageSystem.Killed (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/Damage/DamageSystem.cs:464-546) drops nothing; no PinataMutator exists.

DamageSystem.cs (owned this wave): the QC accuracy/hit-sound accounting point is an explicit omission comment at DamageSystem.cs:227-230; PlayerDamage computes excess at 396 and fires the PlayerDamaged hook at 441-449 (the right anchor for real-credit); Killed fires Combat.Death (495) then MutatorHooks.PlayerDies (498-499), has the resuscitation bail (504-505) and corpse setup (521-543) — the drop call slots between them, exactly the QC order (player.qc:498→522→536).

Fire chokepoints: WeaponFiring.SetupShot (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/Weapons/WeaponFiring.cs:105-158) is the W_SetupShot port — ~36 call sites across the weapon files (Blaster.cs:135 … Vortex.cs:131, full list grepped) — and explicitly defers 'accuracy/hitplot bookkeeping' (WeaponFiring.cs:34,103,182). FireBullet (184-273) and FireRailgunBullet (291-346) already mirror QC's loop structure (damageFraction, falloff, pierced list with per-target distance) so the credit lines drop in 1:1. WeaponSplash.RadiusDamage (WeaponSplash.cs:45-104) is the RadiusDamageForSource port (no stat_damagedone yet). Weapons reach the pipeline via WeaponFiring.ApplyDamage (437-452) → Combat.Damage.

Throw machinery already exists from T35: StartItem.SpawnLoot (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/Items/StartItem.cs:58-59, loot branch 142-179 — MOVETYPE_TOSS, g_items_dropped_lifetime 20 despawn, 0.5s anti-instant-pick ItemSpawnShieldExpire, ItemIsExpiring honored at 160-165, NODROP-brush kill 167-177); WeaponPickup.ItemInit (Items/ItemSpawnFuncs.cs:180-202) seeds OwnedWeaponSet + the default pickup ammo onto the item entity; pickup of a thrown weapon needs NO new code — ItemPickupRules.ItemGiveTo (Items/ItemPickupRules.cs:63-104) gives the resources carried on the loot entity, the weapon block (85-86), and honors Entity.PickupAnyway (65). The per-weapon WeaponPickup cache is private (ItemSpawnFuncs.WeaponPickupFor, 142-147) — needs a public accessor. RandomItemsMutator/OverkillMutator already use the generic loot-drop path as precedent.

Vortex.cs current state (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/Weapons/Vortex.cs): HAS primary charge regen (81-82, but unconditional — no charge_always gate), zoom-charging free path (94-102), charge damage math + shot multiplier (118-128), overcharge sound (134-136), wr_setup charge_start seed (155-158), g_balance_vortex_secondary flag in Balance (35,70) with a refire-gated secondary Attack (103-108) that reuses PRIMARY damage/force (no secondary_* damage cvars). MISSING: the entire chargepool (WeaponSlotState.VortexChargePoolAmmo exists at EntityWeaponState.cs:278 but is never read; the actor-level vortex_chargepool_pauseregen_finished field doesn't exist), the secondary ammo-eating-while-charging ladder, the forced reload (vortex.qc:198-202), charge_velocity_rate, charge-rot decay, and the chargepool's PauseRegenFinished interaction. WeaponAmmo.Check (WeaponFireGate.cs:483) routes vortex secondary to the PRIMARY check — wrong once secondary becomes a real fire mode.

Scoreboard/HUD render side (T9) is READY and gated on data: ScoreboardPanel.SetAccuracy (game/hud/ScoreboardPanel.cs:216-223) takes {weapon RegistryId → pct 0..100, -1 = never fired}, DrawAccuracy (762-778) hides when empty; WeaponsPanel.SetAccuracy (game/hud/WeaponsPanel.cs:45-51) takes {NetName → fraction}. Neither has a feeder. The score wire (src/XonoticGodot.Net/ScoreboardBlock.cs) carries only GameScores int columns — no room for per-weapon accuracy; the owner block is fixed-layout append-at-END (ServerNet.WriteOwnerState game/net/ServerNet.cs:1103-1134 ↔ ClientNet.HandleSnapshot game/net/ClientNet.cs:469-478), the scoreboard change-gating pattern to copy is ServerNet.cs:803-811, NetProtocol.ProtocolVersion = 6 (game/net/NetProtocol.cs:50).

Available Common plumbing: GameScores.GameStopped (Scoring/GameScores.cs:76) + NotificationSystem.WarmupStage (Notifications/NotificationSystem.cs:181) for the isgooddamage gates; MutatorHooks.ForbidThrowCurrentWeapon exists with 3 live subscribers (instagib/overkill/meleeonly — MutatorHooks.cs:337-345) but carries only the player (QC's per-weapon ForbidDropCurrentWeapon arg missing); MutatorHooks.PlayerDies chain exists (fired at DamageSystem.cs:498); NO AccuracyTargetValid chain. Notification ITEM_WEAPON_DROP registered (NotificationsList.cs:385/896/1106). StatusEffectsCatalog 'superweapon' def + per-effect ExpireTime on Entity.StatusEffects (StatusEffects.cs:68,86-115); superweapon expiry removal lives in PlayerFrameLogic.cs:322-344 (Server). Inventory.RemoveWeapon (Inventory.cs:61-65) auto-switches; weapon ownership is DUAL-REP (Entity.OwnedWeaponSet + Player.OwnedWeapons NetName set — ItemPickupRules.cs:230-232). Prandom provides deterministic randomvec. GameWorld owns Scores (GameWorld.cs:87) and calls SubscribeToDeaths at GameWorld.cs:403.
risks: WeaponAccuracy semantics change (counts → damage ratio): Fraction/Hits/Fired are public and RecordWeaponKill currently AddHit's on kills — any existing test or consumer of those counts breaks; the kill-credit MUST be retired into a Frags column or every kill double-counts once real hit-credit flows (QC keeps frags separate, player.qc:494-495).

fireBullet hit-credit subtlety: the credit uses damage*damage_fraction WITHOUT distance falloff (tracing.qc:474) while the dealt damage HAS falloff — easy to 'fix' wrongly and silently diverge from Base accuracy numbers.

~36 SetupShot call-site edits: each weapon's maxdamage must be transcribed from its QC W_SetupShot call (vortex post-charge mydmg, shotgun damage*bullets, hagar per-rocket, crylink per-volley…) — a wrong constant is invisible until accuracy% looks off; cnt_fired once-per-frame guard must use sim time, not call count, or multi-pellet weapons inflate.

Owner-snapshot wire: the accuracy block must be written/read in exact lockstep on both legs and appended after the existing gated scoreboard block (the established append-at-END gotcha) + ProtocolVersion 6→7; T54 owns those files — integration depends on the orchestrator landing the snippets in the same wave or the port won't show accuracy client-side (server-side tallies still testable headless).

Throw ammo exploit fidelity: the loot entity's ItemInit seeds DEFAULT pickup ammo BEFORE the doreduce clamp — the clamp must run AFTER SpawnLoot (min(owner ammo, seeded); g_weapon_stay==2 → 0) or thrown guns duplicate ammo; the clip (WeaponLoad) give-back must read the slot BEFORE Inventory.RemoveWeapon triggers the auto-switch.
Dual-rep weapon removal: forgetting Player.OwnedWeapons.Remove desyncs the HUD strip and the superweapon-expiry sweep (PlayerFrameLogic.cs:327-344 keys off OwnedWeapons NetNames).

Vortex chargepool extends Entity.PauseRegenFinished (health-regen pause) — that field was just touched by the uncommitted player-loop parity pass (REGEN1 Entity/ServerPlayerState split); read the on-disk state and use the field the regen loop actually consults, or the pool silently stops pausing regen.

Cross-directory touches outside ownership: ItemSpawnFuncs.cs (one-line public accessor) and NetGame.cs (HUD feed) are not chokepoints but other A3 tasks may edit them — keep diffs minimal and flag to the orchestrator; extending ForbidThrowCurrentWeaponArgs with a weapon id must stay additive (3 existing subscribers).

IsGoodDamage approximation: the port gates on DeadState==No evaluated pre-damage instead of QC's death_time==time death-frame rule — equivalent for all current call sites (all evaluate before Damage()), but any future post-damage credit site would need the death_time field; document the invariant at the helper.

Common→Server layering: accuracy tallies live in Scores (Server) — the Common bus must tolerate zero subscribers (GameDemo/tests) and Scores' subscription inside SubscribeToDeaths must stay idempotent (it early-returns on _deathHandler; mirror that).
task: T57 — Weapon tail: W_ThrowWeapon (impulse 17 + death drops + pinata), accuracy tracking (fired/hit/real + wire to scoreboard), vortex secondary depth (chargepool)
testPlan: accuracy_byte unit: (0,x)→0-or-1 per n<0/d<=0 rules, (40,80)→51, (80,80)→101, (90,80)→255 — exact accuracy.qc:17-24 mapping.

Fired credit: headless sim, player fires Vortex once at charge_start 0.5 → FiredDamage == 40/80+0.5*0.5 of 80 = 60 (the post-charge mydmg); Shotgun primary → FiredDamage == damage*bullets per shot; CntFired increments once per shot frame even for multi-pellet; warmup_stage true → no fired credit (canbegooddamage).

Hit credit caps: FireRailgunBullet through 2 stacked enemies → HitDamage += min(bdamage, sum) == bdamage (byte 255 only when a later shot's hit exceeds fired); FireBullet penetrating 2 targets → per-hit credit min(damage − total, damage*fraction) never exceeds 100%; splash rocket between 2 enemies → one Hit of min(max(core,edge), statDamageDone); self-rocket-jump → zero hit credit (SameTeam identity).
isgooddamage gates: teammate hit (teamplay) → no credit; corpse re-hit next frame → no credit; kill shot itself → credited (evaluated pre-damage); GameStopped → none.
Real credit: 100-damage Vortex hit on a 50hp/0armor target → Real == 50 (damage − excess), Hit == 100; deathtype-special (e.g. nade) attributes to the attacker's held weapon.
Frags: kill with mortar → Accuracy Frags[mortar] == 1, no extra AddHit from the kill path (no double-count vs step-3 credit).

Throw: impulse 17 via Commands → weapon gone from OwnedWeaponSet AND Player.OwnedWeapons, auto-switched, loot entity with velocity ≈ forward*750, PickupAnyway, item cells == min(owner cells, pickup ammo) and owner reduced; walk over it → ItemGiveTo re-grants weapon + exactly that ammo; g_weapon_stay 2 → item ammo 0 + clip refunded; blaster (weaponthrowable 0) refused; g_weapon_throwable 0 refused; mid-reload (state != Ready) refused; ITEM_WEAPON_DROP notification emitted.

Death drop: kill a player → exactly one loot weapon at body center with randomvec*125+z200 spread (Prandom-seeded determinism); NODROP (lava) death → no item, no crash; g_pinata 1 → all other owned throwable weapons drop too; instagib enabled → pinata inert.

Superweapon throw: player holding only Fireball with Superweapon effect (t=+20s) throws it → item.SuperweaponsFinished ≈ 20, player effect removed, item ItemIsExpiring; with 2 superweapons → item gets timeleft/2 and player effect reduced by that share.

Vortex: stock — hold secondary (zoom) → charge rises at 0.6/s toward 1 while cells drain at sec_ammo(2)/s with the reserve floor stopping at pri_ammo(6) cells; release → regen continues to limit; fire → charge *= shot_multiplier(0). Chargepool cvars on (secondary_chargepool 1) — pool drains at sec_ammo*dt while held, charge += dt*rate, pool regens at 0.15/s only after chargepool_pause_regen(1s) idle, and Entity.PauseRegenFinished is pushed while pool<1. reload_ammo on + clip below min(pri,sec) → forced WrReload. secondary 1 → real secondary shot uses secondary damage/refire.

Wire: ScoreboardBlock-style round-trip test for the accuracy block encoder/decoder (lockstep field order, change-gating: second snapshot with no change sends one bool); ScoreboardPanel.SetAccuracy mapping byte→pct (0→skip, 51→50, 255→100).

Full suite `dotnet build XonoticGodot.csproj` + `dotnet test tests/XonoticGodot.Tests` green (currently ~1059+ tests); headless `--host` auto-fire run shows non-zero accuracy tallies and a pickupable dropped weapon.
